title: Can I synchronise with the specified board when the status changes to maintenance?
excerpt: When I change the task status to maintenance in board A, can the task appear in board B at the same time? Thanks for the answer!

posts.author: aesopg4238 (terrencetai)
posts.cookedHtml: When I change the task status to maintenance in board A, can the task appear in board B at the same time? Thanks for the answer!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @aesopg4238

This is possible!

I believe this is the recipe you’ll need:

Screen Shot 2023-12-15 at 2.20.51 pm1164×508 24.8 KB

You can map the item field (in the recipe) so that the newly created item matches the item in the origin board

posts.author: aesopg4238 (terrencetai)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank Bianca!
I would like to ask if I need board A and board B to be able to mirror the update, is there a way to do this?
Thank you for your answer.

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: It is possible by using same item in multiple boards app! Check it out here: monday.com: Apps Marketplace

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
This can be done for sure!

image1192×364 21.2 KB

Use this automation, and then include a mirror column.

Support

5 min read Feature     Need to store the same information in multiple places across your account? Want to update separate columns without the hassle of doing double the work? By connecting ...

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: aesopg4238 (terrencetai)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for your answer!
But in this case, a new column will be added, is it possible to synchronise all the changes of both boards without adding a new column? Including changing the status, text

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately not, but you can hide the column either with the use of filters or restrict its viewing.

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @aesopg4238 , actually it is possible. This is where Same Item Multiple Boards come in. You can sync all columns without needing an additional column to link the two boards. It’s just a matter of identifying which other board you would like your items to “live”.

posts.author: aesopg4238 (terrencetai)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for reply, can you please point out what steps I need to take to make it work?

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @aesopg4238 , yes we’ve made a video in this article. Syncing items or boards including updates in monday.com boards | Same Item Multiple Boards

posts.author: aesopg4238 (terrencetai)
posts.cookedHtml: Many thanks to Rodney for his clear and detailed explanation!
